item.name: Mailfish
item.description:
A school of these fish creates a striking sheet of silver, like an enormous suit of chainmail drifting through the ocean blue.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: This wavekin's silver scales are reminiscent of chainmail. It swims with its head bowed, and this mannerism has made it popular as a symbol of the Far East's hospitable culture.
